channel.title: Arcade on Marco Martorana
channel.description: Recent content in Arcade on Marco Martorana

item.title: More Than a Machine: Building Memories at 88mph
item.author: marcomatto@gmail.com (Marco Martorana)
item.description:
🕹️ More Than a Machine: Building Memories at 88mph 🚀

They say the best way to predict the future is to create it. Well, previous 2/3 weekends, my son and I decided to build a piece of the past, powered by the tech of today.
